/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libfilament-utils-c.dylib -install_name @rpath/libfilament-utils-c.dylib "CMakeFiles/filament-utils-c.dir/filament-utils/cpp/IBLPrefilter.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/filament-utils-c.dir/filament-utils/cpp/Manipulator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/filament-utils-c.dir/filament-utils/cpp/HDRLoader.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/build libfilament-c.dylib /Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/../filament-main/out/cmake-make-release/libs/iblprefilter/libfilament-iblprefilter.a /Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/../filament-main/out/cmake-make-release/libs/camutils/libcamutils.a /Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/../filament-main/out/cmake-make-release/libs/image/libimage.a /Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/../filament-main/out/cmake-make-release/libs/imageio/libimageio.a /Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/../filament-main/out/cmake-make-release/third_party/libpng/tnt/libpng.a /Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/../filament-main/out/cmake-make-release/third_party/tinyexr/tnt/libtinyexr.a /Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/../filament-main/out/cmake-make-release/third_party/libz/tnt/libz.a /Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/../filament-main/out/cmake-make-release/third_party/zstd/tnt/libzstd.a /Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/../filament-main/out/cmake-make-release/libs/utils/libutils.a /Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/../filament-main/out/cmake-make-release/libs/math/libmath.a /Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/../filament-main/out/cmake-make-release/libs/filaflat/libfilaflat.a /Users/eric/IdeaProjects/filament-kmp-core/c/../filament-main/out/cmake-make-release/libs/filabridge/libfilabridge.a
